evidence.title: How NineBit is building an AI layer to help enterprises unlock value ...
evidence.snippet: # How NineBit is building an AI layer to help enterprises unlock value from their documents. How NineBit is building an AI layer to help enterprises unlock value from their documents. Indore-based NineBit wants to change this with CIQ, an AI-powered intelligence layer that sits on top of an organisation’s existing document systems. The startup, founded in 2023, is building tools that allow enterprises to quickly prototype, automate, and analyse documents using large language models. “I wanted to build something that allows the business owner to do rapid prototyping on their own data,” says Co-founder and CEO Rajeev Jamaiyar. Jamaiyar describes it as “a layer on top of the ECM that corporates set up,” designed to extract information, compare documents, identify gaps, and automate routine workflows. Small and medium enterprises, he says, do not always have access to large consulting firms or expensive AI solutions, leaving a wide-open market for lean platforms like CIQ.

evidence.title: NineBit Computing | LinkedIn
evidence.snippet:
Overview:
Welcome to NineBit Computing - a deep tech startup on a mission to simplify how people interact with documents using cutting-edge Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning. We are a team of engineers and machine learning experts. CiQ by NineBit — now live in Beta — enables seamless, intelligent interaction with documents across formats. Whether it's extracting insights, querying data, or automating workflows, our platform is built to unlock the full potential of unstructured information. Why Work With Us? ✅ Recognized by the Government of India under the Startup India program — giving us access to a strong innovation ecosystem and support network. ✅ Backed by Microsoft for Startups, equipping us with world-class infrastructure, mentorship, and AI tools. ✅ Already Beta Live — we're collaborating with early adopters to co-develop high-impact use cases in real-world environments. ✅ Actively seeking business partnerships with companies ready to explore how Generative AI can streamline workflows, reduce manual effort, and unlock new efficiencies. If your business is looking to lead the next wave of digital transformation through document intelligence — let’s connect. 💼 For Investors We are currently exploring early-stage funding opportunities to support product development, expand our customer base, and accelerate go-to-market efforts. If you’re an investor aligned with our mission to democratize AI-driven document interaction, we’d love to share our story. 📩 Get in touch to explore investment opportunities or request our pitch deck. Join our developer community on Slack [https://join.slack.com/t/ninebit-ciq-community/shared_invite/zt-38oi663on-9R~0J8echKGQ8NV2zRKJZA]

evidence.title: Top 10 Seed Stage Artificial Intelligence startups of Spain - Zefyron
evidence.snippet: These startups use cutting-edge technologies such as machine learning, natural language processing, and computer vision to develop solutions that can automate processes, analyze data, and provide valuable insights. Predictiva uses a Conversational Intelligence platform based on Artificial Intelligence and Natural Language Processing using their technology called Upbe to massively and automatically arrange and categorize the data included in phone conversations. Trajectory Ventures, Plug and Play, K Fund, EASME - EU Executive Agency for SMEs, SaxeCap. Graphext is a powerful exploratory data analysis tool that provides a comprehensive experience for root cause analysis and developing predictive models. The AI-powered system ensures the confidentiality of your data while providing refined search results and generative answers, improving your overall experience. By leveraging ethical artificial intelligence that uses natural language processing (NLP) and machine learning (ML) to analyze vast amounts of unstructured data, Citibeats provides actionable insights into various impact areas like sustainable development, financial inclusion, natural disaster response, migration, social policy, food security, education, and more.
